## Summary

Fixes user-trust issues on the evaluation report page:

1. **Confidence badges removed from absent data** — `confidenceLabel="Low Confidence"` removed from Genre, Shelf, Market Readiness, Target Audience `HeaderField` calls. Badges should only display when there's *inferred* data with uncertainty, not for data that is simply absent ("Not specified" / "Not available").

2. **Progress copy updated** — Both Phase 2 `helperText` branches in `evaluation-poller-display.ts` changed from:
   > "Building your report across all thirteen evaluation criteria."
   
   to:
   > "RevisionGrade is analyzing the manuscript, validating findings, and preparing the final report."
   
   The old copy was technically inaccurate (pipeline does intake, seeds, layers, passes, gates, synthesis — not just "thirteen criteria") and would break with future pipeline changes.

No logic changes. No test updates required (tests assert `label`/`percentage`, not `helperText`).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d4851c426d7b4c5eb439461fb11cc120
